Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7730 "ZETA7-0400-7730" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Zeta-7.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0400 which sets the magic value of $80 at $291 to allow the game to run properly.
